title: Create Master Campaign with All Fields
intent: Verify that an admin user can create a new Master Campaign with complete basic information and target values.
precondition: User is on the Master Campaign List Page. The Add Master Campaign button is visible.
steps: User clicks the Add Master Campaign button.
The Add Master Campaign pop-up opens with an empty form, including Basic Information and Target sections.
User fills all required Basic Information fields with valid values, such as Master Campaign Name, Brand, Period, and Brief Description.
User fills all target fields, including Total Creator, Total Contents, Total Views, Total FYP, Total GMV, and Budget, with valid numeric values according to business rules.
User verifies that the Save button is enabled.
expected_result: The system validates all basic information and target fields and finds no errors.
A new Master Campaign record is created in the system with all entered basic information and target values.
The pop-up closes, and the user is returned to the Master Campaign List Page.
The Master Campaign List Table refreshes and displays the newly created Master Campaign with the correct basic information and target values in the corresponding columns.
The new Master Campaign is available for further actions, such as open detail, edit, and allocation.

source.workbook: ../参考文档/Internal Testing for UAT Gro.xlsx

title: Search by Master Campaign Name (Success)
intent: Verify that the Master Campaign list search can find an existing campaign by name and keep the search keyword visible.
precondition: User is on the Master Campaign List Page. At least one master campaign named Summer Beauty Campaign 2024 exists in the table.
steps: User focuses on the Search Bar at the top of the Master Campaign List Page.
User types Summer into the Search Bar.
User waits for the search to trigger, either automatically or by pressing Enter depending on design.
expected_result: The Master Campaign List Table refreshes and displays only the Summer Beauty Campaign 2024 master campaign, and any other campaigns that match Summer by name if allowed by design.
The search keyword Summer remains visible in the Search Bar.

dependencies.reason: The search case needs an existing Master Campaign record.

source.workbook: ../参考文档/Internal Testing for UAT Gro.xlsx
